name: machine-encoder
description: Quadrature rotary encoder interface using ESP32 PCNT peripheral. Tracks position and direction from 2-phase encoders.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific ESP32 encoder interface.

classes.name: Encoder
classes.example:
from machine import Pin, Encoder

# Rotary encoder on GPIO 4 (A) and 5 (B)
enc = Encoder(Pin(4), Pin(5), filter_ns=1000)

last = enc.value()
while True:
    pos = enc.value()
    if pos != last:
        print('Position:', pos)
        last = pos

esp32_notes: Uses one ESP32 PCNT unit in quadrature mode.
Each encoder uses 2 GPIO pins + 1 PCNT unit.
For simple pulse counting (not quadrature), use machine.Counter.
